_comment: Phase 5 Feature 1: Consistency Distillation — 1-4 step inference
_status: Distillation in progress from P4-A best.pt
motivation: P4-A requires 200 DDIM steps (~2min per batch). Consistency distillation teaches the model to reach the same x0 in 1 step — 200× speedup. Key for practical deployment.

method.teacher: EMA of student (online teacher target, decay=0.9999)

inference_steps.1_step: single forward pass from pure noise — fastest, lower quality
inference_steps.2_step: noise → denoise → re-noise at T/2 → denoise — moderate quality
